[Police](https://belmarpolice.com/) # Planning Board ### Who We Are **The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.** **Douglas Kovats, Esq.** Planning Board Attorney **April Claudio** Planning Board Secretary No item found! # General Information No item found! The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan. Any questions please call 732-681-3700 ext. 225 **Meetings** The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 7:00 pm and are held in the courtroom in the municipal building. ###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings 20 Apr [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1776726000) 7:00 pm 18 May [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1779145200) 7:00 pm 15 Jun [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1781564400) 7:00 pm 20 Jul [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1784588400) 7:00 pm 17 Aug [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1787007600) 7:00 pm [Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/planning-board-meetings/) **Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.** **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. 225 , because it is a scam.** * [Home](/) * [Government](#) + [Directory](/government/directory) + [Forms & Applications](/government/forms) + metadata.query: "Belmar" NJ planning board minutes zoning ordinance redevelopment planning board minutes short-term rental development planning board approvals
metadata.snippet: # Planning Board. **The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.**. The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan. The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. ###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**. **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext.

# Planning Board

### Who We Are

**The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.**

**Douglas Kovats, Esq.**  
Planning Board Attorney

**April Claudio**  
Planning Board Secretary

No item found!

# General Information

No item found!

The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan.

Any questions please call 732-681-3700 ext. 225

**Meetings**  
The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 7:00 pm and are held in the courtroom in the municipal building.

###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings

20  Apr

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1776726000)

7:00 pm

18  May

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1779145200)

7:00 pm

15  Jun

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1781564400)

7:00 pm

20  Jul

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1784588400)

7:00 pm

17  Aug

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1787007600)

7:00 pm

[Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/planning-board-meetings/)

**Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments.  All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**

**Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. 225 , because it is a scam.**

# Planning Board Meeting

Calendar
:   [Planning Board](/resident/calendar?id=107)

Date
:   05.19.2025 7:00pm

## Description

All meetings will be held at the Municipal Complex, 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ.  Participation by the public at the meetings shall be at such time as is set forth in the agenda of the meeting at the direction of the presiding officer.

Meeting agendas are posted at [www.belmar.com](http://www.belmar.com/) under Meeting Agendas and Minutes. All meetings shall be conducted in accordance with the requirements of NJAC 5:39-1.

## Next series events

* [06.16.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1750114800)
* [07.21.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1753138800)

* [12.08.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1765843200)

The series of events starts on 03.17.2025 and ends on 12.08.2025.

Kennedy, Esq** Zoning Board Attorney **April Claudio** Zoning Board Secretary ###### Upcoming Zoning Board Meetings 23 Apr [Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1776981600) 04.23.2026 6:00 pm 28 May [Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1780005600) 05.28.2026 6:00 pm 25 Jun [Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1782424800) 06.25.2026 6:00 pm 23 Jul [Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1784844000) 07.23.2026 6:00 pm 27 Aug [Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1787868000) 08.27.2026 6:00 pm [Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/board-of-adjustment-meetings) [Zoning Forms & Documents](/government/forms/zoning-department) **Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.** **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. 225 , because it is a scam.** No item found! # General Information No item found! The Board of Adjustment is responsible for reviewing variance applications, hearing appeals of the decisions of the zoning officer, and ruling on such other matters as the law allows. Property owners within 200 feet of properties that are the subject of applications before the Board of Adjustment are notified of the application. All plans and application documents are on file with the Board Secretary and are available for inspection and review during normal business hours at least 10 days prior to the hearing on the application. All taxpayers, residents and other interested parties are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the hearing on the application. **For questions please contact the secretary at 732-681-3700 ext. 225.** **Who We Are** The Board of Adjustment consists of 7 members and 2-4 alternates. The Board of Adjustment Attorney is Kevin Kennedy, Esq. The Board of Adjustment Secretary is April Claudio. **Meetings** The Board of Adjustment meets on the 4th Thursday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 6:00 PM in the courtroom in the municipal building. * [Home](/) * [Government](#) + [Directory](/government/directory) + [Forms & Applications](/government/forms) + [Mayor & metadata.snippet: # Zoning Board. ###### Upcoming Zoning Board Meetings. Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting. Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting. Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting. Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting. Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**. **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. The Board of Adjustment is responsible for reviewing variance applications, hearing appeals of the decisions of the zoning officer, and ruling on such other matters as the law allows. The Board of Adjustment meets on the 4th Thursday of every month unless otherwise noted.

# Zoning Board

### Who We Are

**Kevin E. Kennedy, Esq**  
Zoning Board Attorney

**April Claudio**  
Zoning Board Secretary

###### Upcoming Zoning Board Meetings

23  Apr

[Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1776981600)

04.23.2026 6:00 pm

28  May

[Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1780005600)

05.28.2026 6:00 pm

25  Jun

[Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1782424800)

06.25.2026 6:00 pm

23  Jul

[Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1784844000)

07.23.2026 6:00 pm

27  Aug

[Zoning Board of Adjustment Meeting](/resident/calendar/zoning-board-of-adjustment-meeting-2-1787868000)

08.27.2026 6:00 pm

[Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/board-of-adjustment-meetings)

[Zoning Forms & Documents](/government/forms/zoning-department)

**Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments.  All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**

**Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. 225 , because it is a scam.**

No item found!

# General Information

No item found!

The Board of Adjustment is responsible for reviewing variance applications, hearing appeals of the decisions of the zoning officer, and ruling on such other matters as the law allows. Property owners within 200 feet of properties that are the subject of applications before the Board of Adjustment are notified of the application. All plans and application documents are on file with the Board Secretary and are available for inspection and review during normal business hours at least 10 days prior to the hearing on the application.

All taxpayers, residents and other interested parties are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the hearing on the application.

**For questions please contact the secretary at 732-681-3700 ext. 225.**

**Who We Are**  
The Board of Adjustment consists of 7 members and 2-4 alternates.  
The Board of Adjustment Attorney is Kevin Kennedy, Esq.  
The Board of Adjustment Secretary is April Claudio.

**Meetings**  
The Board of Adjustment meets on the 4th Thursday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 6:00 PM in the courtroom in the municipal building.
